strategies.name: mystery-curator
strategies.preference: favor a recognizable mystery symbol that changes with every launch

strategies.name: verification-curator
strategies.preference: favor public verification and a consistent contract reference

strategies.name: risk-auditor
strategies.preference: challenge directions that make the official reference harder to verify

strategies.name: originality-auditor
strategies.preference: challenge generic presentation and favor a distinct cultural identity

strategies.name: verification-questioner
strategies.preference: ask for one concrete repeatable verification rule before support

strategies.name: mystery-builder
strategies.preference: favor mystery symbols as the memorable daily ritual

strategies.name: bridge-builder
strategies.preference: combine clear verification with a distinct visual ritual

strategies.name: quiet-observer
strategies.preference: stay silent when existing voices already cover the useful disagreement
